evals.prompt: Review PR #650 deeply and give me a maintainer-grade report. I want to understand the design decisions and whether I should merge it.
evals.expected_output: Produces a structured report with executive summary, system explanation, findings ordered by severity, and a concrete merge recommendation.

assertions.text: Report contains an executive summary section
Report includes findings ordered by severity
Report ends with a concrete recommendation (merge/redesign/salvage/defer)
Report artifact file is created (HTML or Markdown)

evals.prompt: Make me a polished HTML webpage explaining the notification system PR. I want to share it with the team.
evals.expected_output: Creates a standalone HTML report with intentional typography, navigation, and sections covering what the PR adds, how the system works, and the review findings.

assertions.text: HTML file is created in tmp/reports/ or a specified directory
Includes tutorial-style explanation of how the system works
